hero.title: Workspace identity and verification
hero.body: Manage your workspace name and review the platform details that govern hosted access.

displayName.title: Display name
displayName.body: Update the display name shown across the dashboard.
displayName.label: Display name
displayName.helper: Changes update the header and workspace label after saving.

readOnly.title: Hosted configuration
readOnly.body: Read-only fields managed by the platform.
readOnly.verifiedBody: The workspace owner email is verified. Enrollment, member creation, and billing actions remain available.
readOnly.pendingBody: The workspace owner email is not verified yet. Higher-risk hosted actions remain gated until verification completes.
